title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 24 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 24 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 24 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3.93%，the main contract closed 713.5. the quotation in the morning was increased by 10 yuan/mtover yesterday. and the price continued to increase by 10-20 yuan/mt afternoon.
